entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop targeted for productivity and resilience improvements

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit area

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL BREEDING
entities.description: Traditional methods of crop improvement based on phenotypic selection

entities.name: GENOMIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Data and tools derived from the genome used to enhance breeding

entities.name: CLIMATE-RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of a crop to maintain productivity under adverse climatic conditions

entities.name: GENOMICS TOOLS AND TECHNOLOGIES
entities.description: Technical means for analyzing genetic material, including sequencing and genotyping

entities.name: SEQUENCING
entities.description: The process of determining the nucleic acid sequence

entities.name: GENOTYPING
entities.description: The process of determining the genetic makeup of an organism

entities.name: PHENOTYPIC DATA
entities.description: Information regarding the observable physical traits of an organism

entities.name: GENETIC DATA
entities.description: Information regarding the DNA sequence and variations

entities.name: GENES
entities.description: Segments of DNA that code for specific proteins or traits

entities.name: BIOLOGICAL PATHWAYS
entities.description: A series of actions among molecules in a cell that lead to a certain product or a change in the cell

entities.name: BREEDING-RELATED TRAITS
entities.description: Specific characteristics targeted for improvement during breeding

entities.name: DIAGNOSTIC MARKERS
entities.description: Genetic markers used to identify the presence of a specific trait or gene

entities.name: MARKER-ASSISTED BACKCROSSING
entities.description: A breeding method using markers to introgress a trait into a recurrent parent

entities.name: MOLECULAR BREEDING
entities.description: The use of molecular markers and genomics to improve crops

entities.name: SEQUENCE-BASED HOLISTIC BREEDING
entities.description: An integrated approach combining various omics and selection methods

entities.name: FUNCTIONAL OMICS
entities.description: The study of the relationship between the genome and the phenotype

entities.name: PARENTAL SELECTION
entities.description: The process of choosing the best parents for crossing

entities.name: FORWARD BREEDING
entities.description: The traditional process of crossing and selecting for desired traits

entities.name: GENOME-WIDE SELECTION
entities.description: A method of selecting individuals based on markers across the entire genome

entities.name: GENOME-TO-PHENOME GAP
entities.description: The challenge of linking genetic variation to observable traits

entities.name: GENETIC GAIN
entities.description: The increase in the average value of a trait in a population over time
